entities.name: SOIL-NITRIFIER
entities.description: Microorganisms in the soil that drive the nitrification process

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonia to nitrate in the soil

entities.name: NITROGEN-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant takes up and utilizes nitrogen for growth

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE
entities.description: A potent greenhouse gas emitted as a byproduct of nitrification

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITRIFICATION INHIBITION
entities.description: The ability of certain plant roots to suppress soil-nitrifier activity

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Chemical compounds released by plants to inhibit the activity of soil nitrifiers

entities.name: PHYTOCHEMICALS
entities.description: Plant-derived chemical compounds that can possess BNI functions

entities.name: NITROGEN-CYCLING
entities.description: The movement and transformation of nitrogen through the biological and physical environment

entities.name: GENETIC MITIGATION
entities.description: The application of genetic strategies to reduce agricultural environmental impacts

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect and global warming

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Agricultural technologies designed to increase productivity and resilience while reducing GHG emissions

relationships.description: Rapid nitrification causes declining nitrogen-use efficiency
Rapid nitrification leads to enhanced nitrous oxide emissions
BNI is achieved through the production and release of nitrification inhibitors
Phytochemicals provide the BNI-function to control soil-nitrifier activity
BNI improves nitrogen-cycling in agricultural systems
Genetic mitigation strategies utilize BNI technology to rein in soil-nitrifier activity
BNI helps reduce greenhouse gas emissions
Genetic mitigation reinforces the impact of other climate-smart agriculture technologies
